chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. M.A. No. 95 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 01.04.2022 FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Faisal Ali Raza Bhatti Advocate for appellant. ----- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that a succession application was filed before the concerned court and an order was passed. The succession application was granted, as stated subject to rules, however, the petitioner therein is deliberately avoiding to submit surety. He submits that appellant here has moved an application for substitution of the petitioner to enable other legal heirs to submit surety and to obtain a succession certificate, however, the application was not entertained by the court. I, therefore, in view of statement of the counsel disposed of this appeal with direction that application of any of the legal heir on the aforesaid subject be entertained by the court and be disposed of after hearing all concerned in accordance with law expeditiously preferably in six weeks’ time. JUDGE A.
